ddls:
CREATE TABLE "process_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the process was executed */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the phase of the process */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the phase in seconds */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phase started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phase ended */,
  "gapped" TEXT /* Indicates if there was a gap or interruption */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week for the log entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the log */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_logs_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "site_manager_email" TEXT /* Email address of the site manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "phase_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the phase in the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gaps" (
  "gap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gap entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the log entry where the gap occurred */,
  "gap_description" TEXT /* Description of the gap or interruption */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the gap in seconds */,
  "gap_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gap started */,
  "gap_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gap ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gaps_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES process_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process log being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES process_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site associated with the report */,
  "total_logs" INTEGER /* Total number of logs recorded for the site */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of phases for the site */,
  "gaps_count" INTEGER /* Count of gaps recorded for the site */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the log entry triggering the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES process_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the log entry being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES process_logs ("log_id")
)
